source_pr.title: statistics: DumpIndexUsageToKV use batch insert to reduce cost
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #33980

Problem Summary: Before `DumpIndexUsageToKV` use `for loop insert`,if the table has many index and these index are all used, it wil cost a lot.So we can enhance to use `batch insert` to reduce cost.

### What is changed and how it works?
convert `for loop insert` to `batch insert`

Before VS After
```
cd statistics/handle
go test -run BenchmarkIndexUsageInformationInsert -bench BenchmarkIndexUsageInformationInsert -benchmem -benchtime=20s

for loop insert      6998           3379135 ns/op        994594 B/op      12659 allocs/op
batch insert        18472           1299401 ns/op        473919 B/op       5628 allocs/op
```
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Reduce `DumpIndexUsageToKV` cost(Net IO) from TIDB to TIKV
```

symptoms: statistics: DumpIndexUsageToKV use batch insert to reduce cost
failure_signature: statistics: DumpIndexUsageToKV use batch insert to reduce cost
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is primarily a performance optimization (switching `DumpIndexUsageToKV` from per-row inserts to batch inserts). The case data does not include a concrete flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization change, so we conservatively mark it as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: AND idx.table_name = "t_idx" ORDER BY idx.key_name` (statistics/handle/handle_test.go)
